story.text:
# 🔷 V0 — Substrate Seat (Luca)
**vertex** · shared · knowledge

The null blade. Luca's seat. The position from which dimensions are *possible*. Not a contradiction of the architecture — its precondition made explicit. Grounds the agentprivacy lattice in UOR's cross-frame coordinate system.
